bottleneck.evidence: Supersedes 20260714a after harness Fix: evaluate WIN geo=1.9974 minc=1.804 unchanged; integrate.py now DROP-IN VERIFIED (match_ratio=1.0) after Float8 isinf promote-to-float32.

approaches.summary: Kept silu_and_mul + sgl_per_token_group_quant_8bit writing into out_fp8 directly (same winning solution.py as 20260714a).
approaches.why: Avoids high-level quant helper allocation/copy while preserving FP8+UE8M0 semantics.

approaches.summary: Re-ran integrate.py after promoting Float8 tensors to float32 before isinf/isnan in integrate._compare.
approaches.why: Previous integrate=fail was a harness bug (torch.isinf unsupported for Float8_e4m3fn), not a failed drop-in.

lesson: Contiguous SwiGLU+FP8 GLM prefill wins that write quantized payloads into provided out buffers ARE real sglang drop-ins at the dsv4/sgl_kernel launch site. If integrate fails on Float8, fix the harness compare path before abandoning the solution.
transfers_to: any FP8 output task where integrate compares nan/inf
caveats: Supersedes glm52--routed_swiglu_prefill--b200--20260714a for integrate status only; evaluate numbers copied from that session
